basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate, Research Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University
basic_details.post_name: Young Professional / Consultant Grade-I, Project Associate, Research Associate
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 7 Young Professional / Consultant Grade-I Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Young Professional: 32 Years, Consultant Grade-I: 45 Years
age_limit.details: Young Professional: Maximum age limit is 32 Years. Consultant Grade-I: Maximum age limit is 45 Years. Research Associate-I/II/III: Maximum age limit is 40 Years. Project Associate-I/II: Maximum age limit is 35 Years.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or Post Graduate/Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering/Water Resources/Geoinformatics/Environment Engineering/Architecture/Planning/Design/Social Sciences/Computer Science & Engineering/Computer Applications or equivalent degree. AND 1 year of Industry/Research/Teaching experience for Young Professional and 3-8 years of experience for Consultant Grade-I.
qualification.details: Young Professional or Consultant Grade-I: Ph.D.* or Post Graduate/Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering/Water Resources/Geoinformatics/Environment Engineering/Architecture/Planning/Design/Social Sciences/ Computer Science & Engineering/ Computer Applications or equivalent degree. Experience: 1 year of Industry/Research/Teaching experience for Young Professional and 3-8 years of experience for Consultant Grade-I. Research Associate-I/II/III: Ph.D. or Master Degree in Civil Engineering/Water Resources /Geoinformatics/Environment Engineering/Architecture/Planning/Design/Social Sciences/Computer Science & Engineering/ Computer Applications or equivalent. Experience: 3 years of Research/Teaching experience after Master's degree with at least 1 paper in SCI Journal. Project Associate-I/II: Master's Degree in Science/Computer Applications or Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Architecture/Design in Civil Engineering/Water Resources/ Geoinformatics/ Environmental Engineering/ Architecture/ Planning/ Design/Social Sciences/Computer Science & Engineering or equivalent discipline.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT BHU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT BHU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Young Professional or Consultant Grade-I: Ph.D.* or Post Graduate/Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering/Water Resources/Geoinformatics/Environment Engineering/Architecture/Planning/Design/Social Sciences/ Computer Science & Engineering/ Computer Applications or equivalent degree. Experience: 1 year of Industry/Research/Teaching experience for Young Professional and 3-8 years of experience for Consultant Grade-I. Research Associate-I/II/III: Ph.D. or Master Degree in Civil Engineering/Water Resources /Geoinformatics/Environment Engineering/Architecture/Planning/Design/Social Sciences/Computer Science & Engineering/ Computer Applications or equivalent. Experience: 3 years of Research/Teaching experience after Master's degree with at least 1 paper in SCI Journal. Project Associate-I/II: Master's Degree in Science/Computer Applications or Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Architecture/Design in Civil Engineering/Water Resources/ Geoinformatics/ Environmental Engineering/ Architecture/ Planning/ Design/Social Sciences/Computer Science & Engineering or equivalent discipline.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Young Professional: Maximum age limit is 32 Years. Consultant Grade-I: Maximum age limit is 45 Years. Research Associate-I/II/III: Maximum age limit is 40 Years. Project Associate-I/II: Maximum age limit is 35 Years.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT BHU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the IIT BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 15 July 2026. Candidates are advised to complete their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various posts, including Young Professional/Consultant Grade-I, Research Associate-I/II/III, and Project Associate-I/II, under the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT BHU Various Posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIT BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is online. Interested and eligible candidates must apply through the official website by filling out the prescribed online application form.

faq.question: Q4. What are the age limits for Young Professional and Consultant Grade-I posts?
faq.answer: For the Young Professional post, the maximum age limit is 32 years. For the Consultant Grade-I post, the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Young Professional or Consultant Grade-I at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: Candidates selected for the Young Professional or Consultant Grade-I positions at IIT BHU will receive a salary ranging from ₹50,000 to ₹1,00,000/- per month, depending on their grade and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What qualifications are required for Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: For Research Associate-I/II/III posts, candidates need a Ph.D. or Master's Degree in relevant engineering or science disciplines, along with 3 years of research/teaching experience after their Master's degree and at least one SCI journal paper.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026. Candidates should still refer to the detailed notification for any updates or specific instructions regarding fees.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the various posts under IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and then called for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for IIT BHU Recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to apply for IIT BHU jobs?
faq.answer: The official website to apply for IIT BHU jobs and to find more information about available positions is https://www.iitbhu.ac.in/positions_available. Candidates can visit this portal for application submission and updates.
